description: Account in Hebrew, a list of debtors. The currency given is peraḥim. Many of the debtors are women, including gentile women. Dating: Likely 15th–17th century. For a similar scribal hand and accounting layout, compare with: T-S NS 321.7c (PGPID 25540).
description_he: חשבון בעברית; רשימת חייבים; המטבע: פרחים; רבות מהחייבים נשים, כולל נשים לא יהודיות; כנראה מאות 15-17
